description: see http://hl7.org/fhir/json.html#schema for information about the FHIR Json Schemas

NutritionIntake.description: Records of food or fluid consumption by a patient, capturing current or past intake from sources such as patient memory, nutrition labels, or clinician observation.

id.description: The logical id of the resource, as used in the URL for the resource.

meta.description: The metadata about the resource maintained by infrastructure.

implicitRules.description: Rules followed during resource construction that must be understood when processing.

language.description: The base language in which the resource is written.

text.description: Human-readable narrative containing a summary of the resource.

contained.description: Resources without independent existence apart from the containing resource.

extension.description: Additional information not part of the basic definition.

modifierExtension.description: Additional information that modifies understanding of the element.

identifier.description: Business identifiers assigned by performers or systems.

basedOn.description: Plan, proposal or order fulfilled by this event.

partOf.description: Larger event of which this event is a component or step.

status.description: Code representing the state of intake assertion.

statusReason.description: Reason for the current state of the NutritionIntake.

subject.description: Person, animal or group consuming the food or fluid.

encounter.description: Encounter establishing the context for this NutritionIntake.

occurrenceDateTime.description: Interval during which intake is being asserted.

occurrencePeriod.description: Interval during which intake is being asserted.

recorded.description: Date when the NutritionIntake was asserted.

reportedBoolean.description: Boolean indicating reported status of consumption.

reportedReference.description: Person or organization providing consumption information.

consumedItem.description: What food or fluid product or item was consumed.

ingredientLabel.description: Total nutrient amounts for the whole meal or product.

performer.description: Who performed the intake and involvement level.

derivedFrom.description: Links to NutritionOrder or supporting information.

reason.description: Reason or condition for consuming the food or fluid.

note.description: Extra information not conveyed by other attributes.

NutritionIntake_ConsumedItem.description: Details of consumed food or fluid items.

id.description: Unique id for element within resource.

extension.description: Additional information not part of basic definition.

type.description: Category of consumed item: food, fluid, enteral, etc.

rate.description: Rate at which enteral feeding was administered.

notConsumed.description: Indicator when food was not consumed.

notConsumedReason.description: Reason food or fluid was not consumed.

id.description: Unique id for element within resource.

extension.description: Additional information not part of basic definition.

NutritionIntake_Performer.description: Documentation of who performed intake activity.

id.description: Unique id for element within resource.

extension.description: Additional information not part of basic definition.

actor.description: Individual or entity performing the intake.
